serviceScope: multi-platform draft planning for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn
content intake, draft post packages, approval queue, weekly reporting, and blocked live action visibility
no live social account connection, posting, scheduling, analytics API, or n8n activation
targetMilestones: record AG Digitalz internal client draft configuration
update staged Social Media Management System app with AG Digitalz draft config
review and merge target app PR after safety checks
redeploy dedicated staging-only Netlify site after target merge
keep live social actions blocked until separate owner approval
accessNeeded: future Instagram social OAuth approval required
future TikTok social OAuth approval required
future YouTube Shorts social OAuth approval required
future LinkedIn social OAuth approval required
blockers: platform handles are not_provided and pending_owner_input
risks: live social actions require separate owner approval and connector gates
platform account credentials must never be stored in source-controlled AG OS records
content claims must be limited to proof that exists
